notes: Mogli SMS is a Salesforce managed package with no published external API spec. The adaptor's only network operations (createSMS, updateSMS) POST/PUT to the custom Apex REST resource /services/apexrest/Mogli_SMS/v1/sms on the org's instanceUrl (confirmed in src/Adaptor.js). Generated a focused OpenAPI 3.0.3 from the adaptor surface and source; server URL is a Salesforce instance placeholder. Request/response field names are best-effort from the adaptor examples since the Apex REST payload schema is not publicly documented.
